steps.title: Connect size to energy
steps.content: The passage states that larger rotor diameter means greater energy generation, all else equal. To support the student's claim, the graph data must show a broad shift from smaller newly installed turbines in 2011 to larger newly installed turbines in 2021.

steps.title: Choose the broad shift
steps.content: A claims the largest category increased every year, which the graph does not show. B describes only 2011, so it cannot prove an increase over time. C overstates the 2021 share above 130 meters. The comparison from mostly under 100 meters to mostly at least 115 meters supports the claim. The answer is D.
